title: leymus cinereus
intro: Leymus cinereus, also known as big sand reed or sand blue grass, is a species of grass native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Leymus cinereus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Leymus cinereus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
